# Demand the new system grants stats boosted by over 50%.
你说的对但是Graphwar是一款人气十足（月均在线5人）的免费开源游戏。在这款游戏中，玩家要操控小兵，发射由函数图像构成的子弹来击毙对手，赢得游戏胜利。玩家要在一分钟内输入一个函数式、一阶导数式或二阶导数式，巧妙地避开场地中的障碍物（或者将其直接轰穿），最终达成目标。

2026 May & June  contribution list is here!
We sincerely thank the below <@&1301589804135223316> s  for their help!

⭐ Translation & Proofreading  ⭐
JP: ● **Alza (alz_asn / Alza-asn) **
— Proofreading & Translation 
(Special Ops of Helot: Catena — Story, Stage, Resonance, Relic, etc.; 
Astral Reign — enemy monster skills & states, and more)

TH: ● **darker-kuro **
— Translation 
(Interlude Menus Assignments, corrected various existing translation)

EN: ● **omnichromia **
— Proofreading 
(Arachne kit / Singularity Ultra, Posse 2nd pass, Orisons 2nd pass, various Tooltips, & various effects)

VN: ● **Anicillia **
— Translation 
(Misc. changes & items)
**
⭐ Awakener Pontos — Key Terminology Translation ⭐**

*(A special shoutout to everyone who helped us nail down the key terms for Awakener Pontos across all languages — thank you!
Currently, our machine translation tool may fail to translate certain terms according to our volunteer's version. We are actively fixing the issue!)*

● ID: **Adelle, Rosemary, Yunita, Orithsuka **
● TH: **darkerkuro, Shiraori, NoEyeBunny **
● JP: **Alza **
● VN: **Anicillia **
● RU: **Haps, Riddle **
● DE: **Strandiel **
● FR: **Basile, Lislium **
● 繁體中文: **金雀釵**
